check_box.label: Offline login screen (show an image instead of the web page)
check_box.name: local_login_splash_prefs
check_box.tool_tip: Skip loading the web login page; takes effect the next time the login screen is shown

line_editor.name: splash_image_path
line_editor.tool_tip: Full path to a PNG or JPG to use as the offline login background. Leave empty for the bundled crest.

button.label: Browse
button.name: splash_image_browse
button.tool_tip: Pick an image file for the offline login background

check_box.label: Show logo on the login screen
check_box.name: show_login_logo_prefs
check_box.tool_tip: Show or hide the viewer logo next to the login fields

line_editor.name: login_logo_path
line_editor.tool_tip: Full path to a PNG or JPG to replace the stock logo. Leave empty for the stock logo.

button.label: Browse
button.name: login_logo_browse
button.tool_tip: Pick an image file to replace the login screen logo

check_box.label: Don't remind me about optional updates
check_box.name: no_update_reminders_prefs
check_box.tool_tip: Suppress optional update prompts. Required updates will still prompt, and automatic installation (if selected in Preferences) still works.
